query: GetMint: Turn AI search into a growth channel alternative

results.title: GetMint Raises 4 Million Euros to Become the Leading Platform in AI Search  - GetMint
results.content:
Paris, December 11, 2025 – GetMint has raised 4 million euros to establish itself as the go-to platform for businesses seeking to understand and optimize their visibility across AI models. As LLMs become a key interface for discovery and decision-making, GetMint equips organizations with the tools they need to turn these environments into a growth engine. The round, led by Founders Future with participation from 50 Partners, Kima Ventures, Clover, Better Angle, and sector-leading Business Angels, will help the company accelerate product innovation and scale its expansion in France and abroad.

START FREE. NO CREDIT CARD REQUIRED.

##### Turn AI Search into growth channel

##### Turn AI Search into growth channel [...] About GetMint:

GetMint is the leading platform dedicated to brand visibility in AI-generated responses. It enables companies to measure, understand and improve how models like ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity talk about them. Combining advanced monitoring, strategic and operational analysis, content optimization, and a network of more than 150,000 partner media outlets, GetMint already helps more than 100 brands strengthen their AI presence, attract new customers, and turn conversational search into a growth channel.

Start free trial [...] Profound's AI search visibility dashboard, displaying metrics such as visibility score and top competitors

Scrunch AI frames visibility as a growth and funnel problem. Profound frames it as a reputation problem.

If your primary goal is to report brand health to the board, Scrunch’s technical focus on AXP and page load speeds might be irrelevant. Profound offers a cleaner view of market sentiment.

Its Conversation Engine allows you to see the broader themes users are discussing around your brand (e.g., “privacy concerns” or “customer service”), rather than just tracking where you are in a purchase funnel. ##### They track their AI visibility. Do you?

YOUR PROBLEM [...] STEP 03

### Create, publish, grow

 

  STEP 01

  ### Connect your brand

  Enter your brand name, competitors, and strategic topics. GetMint generates your prompt library automatically and runs a full scan across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and AI Overviews.
 

  STEP 02

  The GEO agent shows you where you're absent, who's winning, and which gaps to close first.
 

  STEP 03

  ### Create, publish, grow

  Use Content Studio to produce AI-ready content. Distribute it on the sources LLMs actually cite. Track your visibility score as it climbs week after week.

 

  STEP 01

  ### Connect your brand [...] YOUR PROBLEM

## AI is already recommending brands. Just not yours.

1.7B people ask AI every month. When they search your category, do you show up?

### You don't show up.

Most buyers ask AI before they decide. There are no ten blue links in that moment, just a recommendation. If your brand isn't in it, you're not in the running.

### You can't measure it.

AI answers shift by model and by run. A few manual checks can't tell you where you really stand.

### You can't act on it.

Even when you spot a gap, closing it means new content, new tools, and lost time.

## Measure. Strategize. Grow. The full AI search loop.

INTRODUCING GETMINT

Most AI Search tools monitor. Some create content. None do both with proprietary data behind every decision.

MEASURE

results.title: 🔎 GetMint announces its €4m pre-seed to become the leader of AI Search - the visibility layer for brands inside LLMs. As search shifts to conversational interfaces, GetMint helps companies… | Kima Ventures
results.content: 🔎 GetMint announces its €4m pre-seed to become the leader of AI Search - the visibility layer for brands inside LLMs. As search shifts to conversational interfaces, GetMint helps companies measure, understand and improve how models like ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity recommend them — turning LLMs into a measurable growth channel. From visibility mapping to source-level recommendations, the platform pinpoints why an organization is mentioned, how it’s described, and what to do to increase qualified recommendations. Already trusted by 100+ brands across SaaS, banking, travel, real estate and retail. Huge congrats to Joan Burkovic, Matthieu Poitrimolt, Emmanuel Costa and the whole team, we’re thrilled to back your category-defining vision. Congrats to Founders
